name: portia
description: Portia — self-hosted enterprise project portfolio management

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --workspace=server && npm install --workspace=client
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.serve: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
